---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or protocol change
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Link to any relevant issues, papers, or regulatory requirements.

## Proposed Design

Describe how you would implement this feature. If it changes the protocol (schema fields, signing payload, log API), describe the changes precisely.

## Breaking Change?

Does this feature require a breaking change to the signing payload or schemas? If yes, describe the migration path and required version bump.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you reject them?

## Test Plan

What tests would be needed to verify this feature?
